rationale: Accepted user clarification is captured in docs and TASK-071. Documentation now treats hot-only default context as an operating-system boundary, not just a UI filter, and clarifies that Control Room may remain internal while user-facing UI naming is CodeWiki. TASK-071 includes acceptance for default graph/state omission of cold refs and explicit archive access.
checks: TASK-071 created with acceptance for hot-only context, explicit archive view, UI naming, and tests
